title: Gsmitty
html: Stub. Friend Yahir confides in during the Jo arc — see 2023 05 28 jo (Yahir tells Gsmitty he might be starting to love Jo) and 2023 08 02 thoughts and things on 8123 jo breakup (Gsmitty had warned about love-as-blinding-drug). Also surfaces in earlier OSU-era journals as "Smitty."

related.label: Aug 2023 thoughts — the Jo breakup post-mortem (kids, pedicure date, Beef show, Salem trip)
